sections.paragraph:
-

(1) fut. יַחֲלשׁ to prostrate, to vanquish, Exo 17:13 followed by עַל Isa 14:12 like the Germ. fiegen über. (Arab. حَلَسَ to prostrate, حَلسُِ manful, brave). Hence חֲלוּשָׁה.

(2) fut. יֶחֱלַשׁ intrans. to be weak, to waste away, to be frail, properly to be prostrated; Job 14:10. (Syr. Ethpael, to be weakened, ܚܰܠܳܫܐܳ weak.)

[Derivatives חַלָּשׁ, חֲלוּשָׁה.]
